blockingIssues.description: The hero 'The Vision Ahead' card omits its evidence hook even though structured source data exists in src/content/narrative.ts, leaving a first-screen future-facing claim without the required evidence/source cue (VAL-NARR-008).

appliedUpdates.description: Extended .factory/library/content-model.md with narrative-surface guidance and a factual note that ConfidenceFrame.dependencies are rendered directly to users, so stored values must be readable user-facing notes.
Added .factory/library/testing.md documenting the repo's Jest + Testing Library setup, including setupFilesAfterEnv and current test-file layout.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Require workers who mark skillFeedback.followedProcedure=true to cite concrete evidence for test-first ordering and any required browser coverage; if the transcript or checks show a deviation, they should mark followedProcedure=false and describe it explicitly.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The scaffold, content-model, and narrative-shell workers all marked followedProcedure true even though their transcripts show implementation before test creation; the scaffold handoff also recorded only a desktop screenshot browser check despite frontend skill guidance calling for broader validation.

rejectedObservations.observation: Carry forward the scaffold review's inert mobile-header menu as an open scrutiny failure.
rejectedObservations.reason: resolved downstream by foundation-narrative-shell-navigation-and-evidence, which added the working MobileNav overlay before this synthesis

rejectedObservations.observation: Carry forward the content-model review's missing narrative-seed-data finding as an open scrutiny failure.
rejectedObservations.reason: resolved downstream by the current shared content layer, which now exports src/content/narrative.ts plus narrative-focused tests

rejectedObservations.observation: Separate skill-adherence observations from multiple reviews.
rejectedObservations.reason: duplicate; consolidated into one systemic AGENTS.md guidance recommendation
